chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜前苹果工程师跨界骨传导耳机，独创技术路线，打破头部企业专利垄断
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 张子怡

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，苏州索迩电子技术有限公司（骨传导运动耳机品牌Mojawa的母公司，以下简称“索迩电子”）于近日完成数千万元人民币的A+轮融资，本轮融资由正海资本领投。

据悉，本轮资金将主要用于拓展海外线下渠道，以及推进产品的AI智能化研发。

在音频产品市场中，由于对无线和开耳式聆听技术的需求不断增加，骨传导耳机市场出现了显著增长。

调研机构Market Growth统计的数据显示，2024年骨传导耳机市场规模为12.8亿美元，预计到2025年将增长到16.11亿美元，到2033年将超过81.5亿美元，复合年增长率为22.8%。

不过，该市场集中度较高，少数头部品牌（如韶音）占据主要份额，并建立相对完善的声学专利布局，提高了新品牌的准入门槛。

索迩电子通过不同的技术路径切入这一市场。公司成立于2020年，早期业务聚焦于B端的触觉反馈技术（Haptics），为VR手柄、智能座舱等提供宽频振动

chinese_news.summary:
今日热点导览

  • OpenAI正考虑采取法律手段起诉苹果公司

TOP 3大新闻

央视确认获得2026年世界杯版权，费用为6000万美元 

5月15日下午，中央广播电视总台与国际足球联合会共同宣布，就国际足联世界杯新周期版权合作达成共识。合作赛事包括2026年世界杯、2030年世界杯、2027年女足世界杯、2031年女足世界杯。

根据双方合作意向，中央广播电视总台确认获得本周期合作赛事中国大陆独家全媒体权利及媒体分授权利，包括开路电视、付费电视、互联网和移动设备等。知情人士透露，中央广播

chinese_news.title: 理想出牌：全新L9上市，45.98万元起｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
理想汽车CEO 李想

能让李想豁出去跳舞挣眼球的发布会，仅在全新一代理想L9上市。

5月15日，理想发布会了全新一代理想L9，推出两个版本——理想L9 livis，售价 50.98万元；理想L9 Ultra版，售价45.98万元。且理想给出了现金2万元的首销权益，截止于6月30日。

chinese_news.summary:

chinese_news.title: 36氪联合PureblueAI清蓝发布「2026消费品牌AI推荐力名册」丨AI时代，品牌如何抢占「推荐力」新战场？
chinese_news.summary:
当你打算入手一部新手机、一台冰箱，或是一瓶面霜时，你的第一个动作是什么？是打开电商平台浏览，还是搜索测评文章？当前，越来越多人的选择是：直接问AI。

“20-30万预算，有什么新能源轿车推荐？”“哪款手机拍照更好？”“敏感肌适用什么洁面？”……这些曾经需要查阅大量攻略、对比无数参数的消费决策，如今正被一个个简洁的AI问答窗口所承接。DeepSeek、豆包、通义千问、腾讯元宝等主流AI助手，正以前所未有的深度渗透进我们的消费生活，成为事实上的“第一入口”和“前置决

chinese_news.title: 长安计划入股千里科技，千里智驾与奥迪推进合作｜36氪独家
chinese_news.summary:
36氪从多位产业人士处了解到，千里科技正积极与长安、奥迪、奇瑞等车企，洽谈智能化合作。

其中，长安不仅有意向搭载千里科技辅助驾驶方案，还计划入股千里科技，双方原定于今年年初完成股权变更。但目前，据知情人士透露，该计划暂无实质性进展。

36氪了解到，北汽是千里科技眼下最具确定性的外部客户，双方计划于今年内成立合资公司。

千里科技与北汽计划合作5款车型，其中包含一款轿车，一款越野车型，还有一款轿跑猎装版。其中部分车型计划于今年发布。

除长安、北汽之外，传统高端品牌奥迪、安徽地方国企奇瑞等车企，也在与千里科技商谈辅助驾驶领域的合作。

千里科技与奥迪的合作较为深入。今年北京车展上，千里科技发布了与北汽合作的汽车品牌”游心“，这与华为和车企的合作模式类似。在这个合作思路下，除了北汽，千里科技也在和奥迪推进合作。

在智能座舱领域，千里科技在与传统豪华品牌奔驰讨论合作。有知情人士告诉36氪：“双方正在谈的，大概率是平台化合作，不止是针对某几款车型。从千里科技为奔驰准备的方案可以看出，都是

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜航天发动机核心部件厂商获投，国内唯一具备核心部件一站式制造能力的民营企业
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，北京思创航天精密制造有限公司（以下简称“思创航天”）近日完成新一轮数千万元融资，由丹诚资本独家投资。

思创航天前身为沈阳融创精密制造有限公司航天项目中心（融创精密为上市公司富创精密全资子公司），早在2020年3月便已开始参与航天发动机零部件制造业务，并于2025年正式独立成立公司。

目前，公司专注于航天发动机、卫星及其他航天产品核心零部件的精密制造。主要客户包括星河动力、星际荣耀、东方空间、大航跃迁、中船重工、沈阳铸造所等。

团队方面，公司创始人徐曙宁曾任沈阳富创事业部高级总监和融创航天项目中心总经理。当前团队70余人，其中核心团队均来自原航天项目中心，具备较强的技术延续性与工程协同能力。

随着国内商业航天逐渐进入批量化、低成本、高效率快速迭代竞争阶段，发动机制造环节的重要性持续提升。相比过去以单点零部件供应为主的模式，行业对于核心部组件设计与制造协同、多

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CLARITY Act regulatory clarity and House momentum on CFTC nominations are removing institutional adoption headwinds; Trump's Q1 2026 tech/growth stock purchases signal macro risk-on tilt.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (CLARITY Act, CFTC nominee pressure); CNBC (Trump portfolio rotation into Meta, Amazon, Oracle); Santiment (euphoria spike post-CLARITY)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed raise rates at least once before June 30, 2027?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Fed funds futures now pricing in a hike as soon as December 2026 following inflation surge; Trump's China summit (no major trade deal confirmed) suggests stagflationary risks remain.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (traders see next Fed move as a hike, December 2026 pricing)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Nvidia's market cap exceed $4 trillion by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Cerebras IPO signals unstoppable demand for AI chips; Trump bought NVDA competitor Broadcom in Q1, but continued chip shortage narrative supports NVDA upside.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Cerebras wild IPO, Nvidia competitor story; Trump Q1 Broadcom purchase)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX complete its IPO by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CoinDesk reports SpaceX targets June 11 IPO pricing on Nasdaq; rare mega-cap space launch event with massive retail/institutional interest.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (SpaceX June 11 IPO pricing, Nasdaq listing)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum/Bitcoin ratio exceed 0.10 by August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Solayer launching Visa-compatible USDC cards signals scaling/stablecoin adoption; LayerZero bridge competition (Lombard exodus to Chainlink) may compress ETH alt premium.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Solayer USDC card launch, LayerZero/Chainlink bridge narrative); on-chain sentiment

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Trump nominate at least two new CFTC commissioners by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Federal Register (CFTC official announcements) or White House press releases
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: House committee leaders are actively urging Trump to fill CFTC seats; CLARITY Act momentum creates political tailwind. Market likely underestimates speed of nominations given Trump's control and crypto lobby pressure.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (House lawmakers urging Trump on CFTC fill); Cointelegraph (CLARITY Act, ethics debate looming on floor vote)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Berkshire Hathaway's airline holdings (including Delta stake) exceed 5% of portfolio by March 31, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Berkshire Hathaway 13-F filings (SEC EDGAR) or annual shareholder letters
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: $2.6 billion Delta position signals Buffett confidence in post-Trump deal normalization; geopolitical tensions (Trump-Xi summit, no major trade wins) may validate airline sector hedge. Few traders pricing Buffett conviction.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Berkshire returns to airlines with $2.6B Delta stake, 14th-largest holding); macro backdrop of Trump dealmaking tempo

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Saudi Arabia tokenize at least $100 billion in assets by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Saudi Ministry of Finance announcements, CoinDesk, or Bloomberg reports on official tokenization programs
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk reports Saudi Arabia tokenizing multi-trillion-dollar economy to protect wealth from global shocks; this is a state-level strategic initiative with massive implied volume. Crypto market has not priced in Middle East sovereign tokenization.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Saudi Arabia tokenizing multi-trillion dollar economy)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will OpenAI successfully sue Apple in court by June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Reuters, Bloomberg, or court dockets (US District Courts); settlement or ruling required
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr reports OpenAI considering legal action against Apple; high-profile case with tech policy implications. Few prediction markets price AI company litigation, but this has regulatory spillover.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Hyperliquid energy trading volume exceed $10 billion 24h by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Hyperliquid official trading volume dashboard or CoinDesk/Cointelegraph market reports
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CME and ICE are pressing regulators to scrutinize Hyperliquid over manipulation risks, signaling competitive threat to traditional energy futures. Market has not yet priced in either regulatory crackdown or explosive growth; binary outcome.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk & Cointelegraph (CME, ICE pushing regulators to 'rein in' Hyperliquid; manipulation risk reports)

investment_theses.thesis: Long Bitcoin and Ethereum on CLARITY Act regulatory clarity + Trump rate-hike expectations creating macro bifurcation between inflation hedge (BTC) and tech-growth reopening (ETH/staking).
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: House CLARITY Act passed key hurdle; CFTC member nominations accelerating institutional on-ramp
CNBC: Fed funds futures pricing December 2026 hike; Trump portfolio heavy in tech (Meta, Amazon, Oracle, Broadcom)
Santiment: 'Major spike of euphoria' post-CLARITY Act shows retail/smart money repricing risk-on
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory clarity could trigger sell-the-news if actual CFTC rules prove restrictive or conservative; Fed hikes could crush risk assets if inflation persistence forces aggressive tightening.
investment_theses.expression: Long 60% BTC perps + 40% ETH 3-month perpetuals on FTX/Bybit; hedge with short 2Y UST (or long DXY) if Fed signals <2 hikes by Dec 2026

investment_theses.thesis: Long NVIDIA and semiconductor sector (SMH ETF) on Cerebras IPO demand signal and Trump's Q1 tech consolidation, but short AI narrative crowding via long XLE/energy on Hyperliquid disruption risk.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Cerebras 'stunning' IPO signals 'unstoppable demand for AI chips'; Trump loaded Broadcom, Oracle in Q1
36Kr: Samsung developing next-gen HBM packaging for mobile + automotive; supply chain tightening
CoinDesk: Hyperliquid energy trading gaining traction; CME/ICE defensive posture suggests market share shift
investment_theses.counter_view: Semiconductor cycle may be peaking if enterprise AI capex disappoints; Hyperliquid regulatory crackdown could reverse trend faster than expected.
investment_theses.expression: Long SMH ETF (NVDA, AVGO, MU, TSM heavyweights) vs. short XLE (oil futures proxy); or pair-trade NVDA long vs. SEMI short rotation on cycle peak fears

investment_theses.thesis: Long dollar (DXY) and short emerging-market risk on Trump-Xi summit offering no major trade breakthroughs, Taiwan de-escalation rhetoric, and Fed rate hike pricing—macro risk-off tilt favors safe havens.
supporting_signals: BBC/CNBC: Trump-Xi talks 'very successful' but 'few deals confirmed'; Trump warns Taiwan against independence, signals no major tariff breakthrough
CNBC: Fed hike expected December 2026; inflation surge reshaping rate expectations
Macro: Persistent geopolitical friction (Lebanon ceasefire fragile, Iran tensions, Ukraine) supports DXY bid
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump may surprise with a China trade deal over the summer, triggering risk-on rally and DXY weakness; Fed could pause hikes if growth stumbles.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY futures (or USD/CNH forwards) vs. short EEM (emerging market ETF); or long gold (GLD) as macro hedge against stagflation

investment_theses.thesis: Long Delta Air Lines and airline sector (IYH, XRT) on Berkshire's $2.6B stake signaling post-Trump deal-normalization confidence and capacity recovery, but size position cautiously given geopolitical overhang.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Berkshire returns to airlines after decade+; $2.6B Delta stake is 14th-largest holding—Buffett conviction signal
Trump macro backdrop: Dealmaking tempo suggests trade normalization, reduced tariff risk; geopolitical tensions (Iran, Lebanon) create near-term noise but not structural headwind
Post-COVID capacity constraints + corporate travel rebound signal pricing power
investment_theses.counter_view: Geopolitical shock (Iran escalation, Taiwan crisis) could crater travel demand; Berkshire stake may be contrarian top-call if airline margins compress on cost inflation.
investment_theses.expression: Long DAL (Delta) or IYH (airline ETF); pair-trade long DAL vs. short LUV (Southwest) if consolidation thesis plays out

investment_theses.thesis: Long stablecoin infrastructure (Solayer's USDC card launch signals USDC adoption at scale; LayerZero bridge competition) via Chainlink (LINK) and Solana ecosystem (SOL) as payment layer bifurcates from Layer-1 speculation.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Solayer launches Visa-compatible USDC card; Lombard LayerZero exit to Chainlink ($4B asset migration)
Macro: Stablecoin adoption accelerates as regulatory clarity (CLARITY Act) removes institutional friction
36Kr: China accelerating digital yuan; Saudi Arabia tokenizing economy—global CBDC/stablecoin race heats up
investment_theses.counter_view: USDC adoption may be priced in already; Chainlink's bridge dominance could face centralization criticism; Fed rate hikes reduce carry incentives for stablecoin yield.
investment_theses.expression: Long SOL and LINK vs. short high-risk L2 tokens (e.g., Arbitrum, Optimism) as payment/infrastructure thesis outperforms spec plays
